text.div: ADMISSION: 78yo F admitted 2024-03-29 for community-acquired pneumonia (CAP). HOSPITAL COURSE: Started on ceftriaxone 1g IV QD + azithromycin 500mg IV QD. Transitioned to oral amoxicillin-clavulanate on day 3. Oxygen requirements resolved by day 4. DISCHARGE: Clinically improved. SpO2 97% RA. CXR: improving infiltrates. DISCHARGE Rx: amoxicillin-clavulanate 875/125mg PO BID x5d. FOLLOW-UP: PCP in 1 week, repeat CXR in 6 weeks.
